varieties.name: Winter Melon Round
varieties.origin: Traditional Asian variety, cultivation history 500+ years
varieties.traits: Round to slightly oblate shape, 25-35 cm diameter, dark green skin developing white waxy coating
varieties.flesh_fruit: Thick white flesh, mild sweet flavor, excellent texture retention when cooked
varieties.yield_notes: 4.5-11 kg (10-24 lbs) per fruit, highly productive on strong vines
varieties.availability: Succeed Heirlooms Australia, Happy Valley Seeds, Local Seeds, Fair Dinkum Seeds

varieties.name: Tong Qwa (Small Round)
varieties.traits: Compact round shape, 10-15 cm diameter, perfect for small gardens and container growing
varieties.flesh_fruit: Dense white flesh, crisp texture, slightly sweet
varieties.yield_notes: 1.5-3 kg (3-7 lbs) per fruit, prolific bearer
varieties.availability: Online seed suppliers, Asian grocery seed sections

varieties.name: Winter Melon Long
varieties.traits: Elongated cylindrical shape, 50-80 cm long, 10-15 cm diameter, light green with waxy coating
varieties.flesh_fruit: Pure white flesh, crisp when raw, absorbs flavors well when cooked
varieties.availability: Fair Dinkum Seeds (Queensland grown), Local Seeds, Harris Farm Markets

varieties.name: Asian Oblong Shape
varieties.traits: Classic oblong form, light green skin with fine hair becoming waxy at maturity
varieties.yield_notes: Up to 9 kg (20 lbs) per fruit
varieties.availability: The Amazing Seeds, Australian heirloom suppliers

varieties.name: Chi Qua (Jie Gua)
varieties.traits: Elongated cylindrical, 30-40 cm length, light green with fine hairs
varieties.flesh_fruit: Mild zucchini-like flavor, firm crisp texture when young
varieties.yield_notes: Multiple harvests, 0.5-1 kg per fruit when harvested young
varieties.availability: Asian seed suppliers, Brisbane Asian markets

varieties.name: Mo Gwa (Mao Gua)
varieties.traits: Similar to Chi Qua, 23-28 cm long, 6 cm diameter, dark green with tender skin
varieties.flesh_fruit: Tender thick white flesh, mild flavor
varieties.yield_notes: Prolific, continuous harvest over long season

varieties.name: Fuzzy Star Hairy Gourd
varieties.traits: F1 hybrid, uniform 23-28 cm fruits, dark green with fine hair coating
varieties.yield_notes: High yield with uniform fruit size

varieties.name: Wax Gourd F1
varieties.origin: Modern breeding, developed for warm climates
varieties.traits: Large fruits up to 10 kg, excellent uniformity
varieties.flesh_fruit: Thick white sweet flesh, great for stir-fry and soups

varieties.name: Indu
varieties.traits: Medium-sized globular fruits, 8-10 kg average, substantial flesh thickness
varieties.yield_notes: 24.5 metric tons per hectare - high yielding variety
varieties.availability: Kerala Agricultural University, state agricultural departments

varieties.name: Indian Ash Gourd (Generic)
varieties.origin: Traditional Indian variety, widely cultivated across subcontinent
varieties.traits: Large oblong to round shape, dark green skin with characteristic rough white ash coating
varieties.flesh_fruit: Mild-tasting white flesh, versatile for soups and curries
varieties.yield_notes: Can exceed 18 kg (40+ lbs) per fruit

varieties.name: Petha Kaddu (North Indian)
varieties.traits: Large firm fruits, traditionally used for making petha candy
varieties.flesh_fruit: Firm white flesh with low water content, ideal for candy making
varieties.availability: National seed suppliers, specialized online retailers

varieties.name: Dong Gua (Chinese Winter Melon)
varieties.origin: China, ancient cultivation dating to 500 CE
varieties.traits: Large fruits 15-80 cm length, round to oblong, smooth waxy coating
varieties.flesh_fruit: White flesh, mild vegetal flavor, absorbs seasonings well
varieties.yield_notes: 5-20 kg per fruit depending on type

varieties.name: Bi Dao (Vietnamese)
varieties.traits: Medium-sized fruits, good for tropical monsoon climates
varieties.flesh_fruit: Tender white flesh, excellent for soups
varieties.availability: Southeast Asian seed networks, specialty importers
